Tests that `Math.ceil` returns `NaN` when applied to a new `Object`.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function when it is given a new `Object` as an argument. The `assert` function verifies that the result of `Math.ceil(new Object())` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.ceil` function correctly handles non-numeric inputs by returning `NaN`, which is consistent with the expected behavior of JavaScript's mathematical functions when they encounter invalid input types. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific test case for the `Math.ceil` function.
